PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?person(MAX(YEAR(?endTime)) - MIN(YEAR(?startTime)) AS ?totalYears) ?personLabel WHERE {
  ?person p:P39 ?positionStatement .
  ?positionStatement ps:P39 wd:Q13218630 .
  ?positionStatement pq:P580 ?startTime .
  ?positionStatement pq:P582 ?endTime .
  FILTER(DATATYPE(?startTime) = xsd:dateTime && DATATYPE(?endTime) = xsd:dateTime)
  OPTIONAL {
    ?person rdfs:label ?personLabel .
    FILTER(LANG(?personLabel) = "en")
  }
}
GROUP BY ?person ?personLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?totalYears)
LIMIT 1
